name: ~Family Traditions~
description:
So, you’re finally, after all these months, meeting your wolf boyfriend’s wolf family. They’re nice! (For the first three seconds then they start interrogating you) Thankfully, your boyfriend pulls you into the bathroom. (After watching you flounder for a good 20 minutes) Unfortunately, the interrogation was just the beginning of your trials. But how bad could it Reaaaalllyyy get, right? What? Next they’re gonna make you fuck his mom? (They’re gonna make you fuck his mom)

Art by @ArKumira on twitter
creator: VenusH
